Class ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.sort.AbstractSort
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.SortImpl
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.ProgramSVSort
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasOrigin, Named, Sort
Enclosing class:
ProgramSVSort
public static final class ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort extends ProgramSVSort
This sort represents a type of program schema variables that match on string literals and string variables.
